20+ Years of Preparing Qualified Educators.
Established in 2004, MMITE prepares aspiring teachers through structured academic formation, disciplined supervision, and qualification-focused outcomes — shaping professionals who step into classrooms with clarity and confidence.

Our Journey

Two Decades of
Teacher Preparation

Every teacher begins as a student. Since 2004, MMITE has functioned as the professional training wing within the ERAM ecosystem, preparing aspiring educators for structured classroom leadership.

Over two decades, the institute has built a reputation for disciplined academic execution, structured mentorship, qualification-focused preparation, and strong placement outcomes.

"The journey of MMITE is not defined by scale, but by outcomes. Its graduates do not merely complete a course — they clear examinations, secure top ranks, and enter classrooms prepared."

Today, MMITE stands as the professional training pillar of the ERAM ecosystem — producing educators who carry institutional discipline into every classroom they lead.

Two Decades of Structured Formation

2004

MMITE Established

Mariyumma Memorial Institute of Teacher Education founded as the professional training wing of the ERAM Educational & Welfare Trust — the same year as MMPS.

Early Years

D.El.Ed Programme Structured

The two-year, four-semester D.El.Ed curriculum embedded — 14 papers aligned with NCERT/SCERT standards, integrating theory, pedagogy, and practical teaching assignments.

Milestone

Kerala's First TTI with a Printed Magazine

MMITE became Kerala's first and only Teacher Training Institute to publish a printed magazine — a marker of academic expression and institutional identity.

2025

45 of 53 Students Clear KTET

In 2025, 45 out of 53 students cleared the Kerala Teacher Eligibility Test — a result that reflects the strength of MMITE's focused qualification preparation system.

Present

PSC Top Ranks · Reputed Placements

Alumni securing 4th and 6th PSC ranks and placed in reputed institutions — reinforcing MMITE's reputation as an outcome-driven teacher education institute.

Academic Structure

AFrameworkBuiltforTeaching.

The D.El.Ed programme at MMITE follows a two-year, four-semester structure comprising 14 academic papers aligned with NCERT / SCERT standards. The focus is not theoretical knowledge alone — but the formation of disciplined educators capable of leading classrooms independently.


D.El.Ed — Theoretical Foundations

Education theory, child psychology & development

Pedagogical Methodology

Classroom management & structured teaching

Practical Teaching Assignments

Structured internal assessment & internships

Academic Support Systems

Theoretical Foundations of Education

Pedagogical Methodology

Child Psychology & Development

Classroom Management Training

Practical Teaching Assignments

Structured Internal Assessment

Internship in International Schools

15-Day Residential Leadership Camp

Our Principal

VIGI
S

Principal · MMITE

Institutional Strengths

Discipline, Mentorship & Professional Formation

At MMITE, teacher formation is deliberate and supervised. With a limited intake of 50 students per batch, mentorship remains focused and individualised. Academic progress is continuously monitored, and practical training is integrated throughout the course duration.

  • Structured practice teaching exposure across real classrooms
  • Internship opportunities in international schools
  • 15-day residential camp — empathy, adaptability & leadership
  • Secular and inclusive institutional culture
  • Focused batch size of 50 for individual mentorship
  • KTET & PSC qualification-focused preparation

No student goes unnoticed. No parent remains uninformed.

MMITE Student Communication Channel

06-06-2026 · Academic Outcomes

🎓KTET Result: 45 out of 53 students cleared KTET 2025. Congratulations to this batch — results reflect structured preparation and discipline.

05-06-2026 · Academic Coordination

📋Practice Teaching: Semester 3 teaching assignments begin Monday. Schedule shared with all students.

04-06-2026 · Programme Coordination

🏕️ Residential Camp: 15-day leadership camp confirmed for December. Attendance mandatory for all enrolled students.

03-06-2026 · Editorial Team

📰 Magazine: MMITE's annual printed magazine submissions open. All students encouraged to contribute.

Performance
That Speaks

MMITE demonstrates strong qualification outcomes year after year — a direct result of structured training, focused academic execution, and individualised mentorship across every batch.

Qualification Benchmarks

KTET 2025

45 out of 53 Students Cleared the Kerala Teacher Eligibility Test

A qualification outcome that reflects focused KTET preparation, structured academic execution, and disciplined mentorship across the two-year programme.

PSC Rankings

PSC Top Ranks Secured — 4th and 6th Positions by Alumni

Alumni who passed through MMITE's structured formation have gone on to secure top PSC ranks and placement in reputed educational institutions across the region.

Academic & Creative Engagement

Kerala First

Printed Magazine

Academic & Literary Expression

Kerala's first and only Teacher Training Institute with a printed institutional magazine — a platform for academic expression and professional identity.

Academic Engagement

Seminars & Workshops

Professional Development Platforms

Structured seminar and workshop participation — strengthening confidence, pedagogical clarity, and professional communication in future educators.

Leadership Formation

15-Day Residential Camp

Empathy · Adaptability · Leadership

An immersive residential programme focused on building the personal and professional qualities that define effective, empathetic classroom leaders.

Communication & Admission

Structured Access.
Clear Coordination.

Administrative coordination and admission enquiries are streamlined through the ERAM Student & Parent Portal and institutional communication channels — ensuring clarity in admissions, coursework, and academic updates at every stage.

Prospective students and current enrollees access all programme information, fee systems, and notices through a single, unified interface.

/01

Admission Enquiries

Streamlined admission process & eligibility guidance

/02

Academic Updates

Coursework notices & semester schedules

/03

Fee Management

Programme fee access & payment systems

/04

ERAM-Wide Access

Unified portal across all 5 ERAM institutions

MMITE — Live Communication Feed

Semester 3 teaching practice schedule uploaded. All students to confirm placement schools.

Academic · 15 minutes ago

2026–27 admissions now open. Eligibility: +2 Pass. Intake: 50 students.

Admissions · 1 hour ago

KTET preparation workshop — Session 4 begins this Saturday, 9 AM.

Qualification Prep · 2 hours ago

Magazine submissions deadline extended to 30th June. All contributions welcome.

Editorial · 4 hours ago

Residential camp dates confirmed — December 10–25. Travel arrangements to be shared shortly.

Programme · Yesterday
Admissions 2026–27

Begin Your Formation at MMITE.

Applications are now open for the D.El.Ed programme — a two-year course for aspiring educators seeking structured academic formation, qualification-focused preparation, and professional mentorship. Eligibility: +2 Pass. Intake limited to 50 students per batch.
